fa492df2.name: opening_auction_imbalance_fade

b8934acb.name: lunch_lull_breakout_continuation
b8934acb.description: Narrow 11:30-13:30 ET consolidation breakouts continue into close.

cd0ec383.name: lunch_lull_breakout_continuation
cd0ec383.description: Long when price breaks above the 11:30-13:30 ET range AFTER 13:30, Short when it breaks below. Exit at close (15:55). Stop at consolidation midpoint. Only fire on days where the 11:30-13:30 range is less than 0.5 * 20-day ATR.

1b1f4ea2.name: lunch_lull_breakout_continuation
1b1f4ea2.description: Long when price breaks above the 11:30-13:30 ET range AFTER 13:30, Short when it breaks below. Exit at close (15:55). Stop at consolidation midpoint. Only fire on days where the 11:30-13:30 range is less than 0.5 * 20-day ATR.

2b81c559.name: qqq_spy_dispersion
2b81c559.description: Trade QQQ when its residual vs SPY (beta-hedged) exceeds 2 sigma; exit at 0.3 sigma.
